title: 1x Acrylic Paint - 100ml - Black - Professional Artist Art Craft Painting Supplies for Canvas Wood Glass Fabric Paper Clay Ceramic - By Ashley
features: This non-toxic, fast drying water based paint becomes water resistant when dry.

Ideal for arts & crafts for use on paper, canvas, card, wood etc, it can be diluted with water to create a water colour effect, or used straight from the tube for an oil paint effect & the colours can be easily mixed.
It is easy to clean up with soap & water if required.
